data.title: ICL Group Announces $52 Million Dividend Distribution
data.description:
Icl ( (ICL) ) has shared an update.

ICL Group Ltd. announced a dividend distribution of approximately $52 million, with a dividend per share of $0.04030 in US dollars and ILS 0.1469338 for those receiving payment in Shekels, based on the March 11, 2025 exchange rate. The record date for shareholders is March 12, 2025, with payment scheduled for March 25, 2025. The dividend payment will be subject to varying withholding tax rates depending on the residency of the shareholders, with specific rates for Israeli and foreign residents. This distribution reflects ICL’s ongoing commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

More about Icl

ICL Group Ltd. operates in the specialty minerals and chemicals industry, focusing on the production and distribution of fertilizers, industrial products, and performance products. The company is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel, and is known for its global reach and diverse product offerings.

YTD Price Performance: 24.60%

Average Trading Volume: 895,726

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $7.97B

data.description:
Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. ( (SG:BEZ) ) has provided an update.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. has announced the issuance of 3,000 new ordinary shares following the exercise of warrants at S$0.22 per share, increasing the total number of issued shares to 199,213,406. This move is part of the company’s ongoing financial strategies, potentially enhancing its market position and providing additional capital for future endeavors, with 59,760,110 warrants still outstanding.

More about Beng Kuang Marine Ltd.

Beng Kuang Marine Ltd. is a company based in Singapore, operating in the marine industry. It focuses on providing a range of services and products related to marine engineering and construction, catering to various stakeholders in the maritime sector.

data.title: China Datang Reports Surge in February 2025 Power Generation
data.description:
China Datang Corp. Renewable Power Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1798) ) just unveiled an update.

China Datang Corporation Renewable Power Co., Ltd. announced a significant increase in its power generation for February 2025, with a total output of 3,263,763 MWh, marking a 20.20% rise compared to the same period in 2024. This growth is driven by a 20.46% increase in wind power and a 17.74% rise in photovoltaic power generation, highlighting the company’s expanding capabilities and strengthening its position in the renewable energy industry.

More about China Datang Corp. Renewable Power Co. Ltd. Class H

China Datang Corporation Renewable Power Co., Ltd. is a company operating in the renewable energy sector, primarily focusing on wind and photovoltaic power generation. It is involved in the production and distribution of clean energy, contributing to the sustainable energy market.

data.title: Kodiak Copper Strengthens Exploration Leadership with Key Appointments
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Kodiak Copper ( (TSE:KDK) ).

Kodiak Copper Corp. has announced the promotion of Dave Skelton to Vice President of Exploration and the appointment of Baykan Aksu as Senior Geologist. This leadership change follows the retirement of Jeff Ward from day-to-day operations, who will continue in an advisory role. The appointments are expected to strengthen Kodiak’s exploration efforts, leveraging Skelton’s extensive experience and Aksu’s contributions to the MPD project, which is central to Kodiak’s strategic focus.

More about Kodiak Copper

Kodiak Copper Corp. is a company focused on copper porphyry projects in Canada and the USA, with a particular emphasis on the MPD copper-gold porphyry project in British Columbia. This project is situated in the Quesnel Terrane, a region known for its mining activities and potential for large-scale mineral deposits.

YTD Price Performance: 4.17%

Average Trading Volume: 47,352

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$28.62M

data.title: Clearwater Analytics Expands with Strategic Acquisitions
data.description:
Clearwater Analytics Holdings ( (CWAN) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 11, 2025, Clearwater Analytics Holdings announced two strategic acquisitions, Beacon and Blackstone’s Bistro, to enhance its investment management technology platform. The acquisition of Beacon, a leader in cross-asset class modeling and risk analytics, and Bistro, a portfolio visualization software, aims to provide a unified, real-time view of portfolios, thereby improving risk management and operational efficiency for institutional investors. This move positions Clearwater as a comprehensive solution provider in the investment management industry, promising enhanced transparency and decision-making capabilities for stakeholders.

More about Clearwater Analytics Holdings

Clearwater Analytics Holdings is a company operating in the financial technology industry, providing investment management solutions. Its primary services include data aggregation, portfolio accounting, and analytics for institutional investors, with a focus on integrating technology across public and private securities to enhance investment decision-making.

data.title: Ebiquity Issues New Shares to Enhance Capital Management
data.description:
Ebiquity ( (GB:EBQ) ) has issued an announcement.

Ebiquity plc has announced the issuance of 5,000 new ordinary shares following the exercise of options under its share option scheme. These shares are set to be admitted to AIM, increasing the total number of shares to 140,577,122. The Ebiquity plc Employee Benefit Trust holds a portion of these shares but has agreed not to vote them, affecting the voting rights calculation for shareholders. This move reflects Ebiquity’s ongoing efforts to manage its share capital and maintain transparency with stakeholders.

More about Ebiquity

Ebiquity plc is a leading company in media investment analysis, providing data-driven solutions to optimize media spending for brand owners. The company operates independently, offering services in media management, media performance, marketing effectiveness, and contract compliance. Ebiquity serves over 70 of the world’s top 100 advertisers, analyzing a significant portion of the global advertising market.

YTD Price Performance: 17.50%

Current Market Cap: £31.33M

data.title: Global Net Lease Expands Board with New Director
data.description:
Global Net Lease ( (GNL) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 7, 2025, Global Net Lease, Inc. expanded its board of directors from nine to ten members, appointing Leon C. Richardson as a new director. Richardson, founder and CEO of The Chemico Group, brings over 15 years of governance experience and leadership across various industries, which is expected to enhance GNL’s strategic decision-making and shareholder value.

More about Global Net Lease

Global Net Lease, Inc. (NYSE: GNL) is a publicly traded, internally managed real estate investment trust that focuses on acquiring and managing a global portfolio of income-producing net lease assets across the U.S., and Western and Northern Europe.

data.title: Panther Metals PLC Explores Dual Listing on Canadian Stock Exchange
data.description:
Panther Metals Plc ( (GB:PALM) ) has issued an announcement.

Panther Metals PLC is considering a dual listing on the Canadian Stock Exchange to capitalize on Canada’s favorable tax environment for mineral exploration and increased interest from North American investors. The company plans to settle its outstanding debt by issuing new shares and warrants, subject to shareholder approval, and aims to leverage the Canadian Flow-Through and Critical Mineral tax credit system to advance its projects and enhance shareholder value.

More about Panther Metals Plc

Panther Metals PLC is an exploration company listed on the London Stock Exchange, focused on discovering commercially viable mineral deposits in established mining jurisdictions. The company utilizes advanced technologies and geological data to rapidly assess drill targets, with a current portfolio comprising three properties in Ontario, Canada.

data.title: VinFast Achieves Record EV Deliveries in Vietnam for February 2025
data.description:
VinFast Auto ( (VFS) ) has shared an announcement.

In February 2025, VinFast Auto Ltd. delivered over 12,500 electric vehicles in Vietnam, contributing to a total of more than 22,800 deliveries in the first two months of the year. This achievement underscores VinFast’s leading position in the Vietnamese market, with a notable 20% increase in sales from January, driven by the popularity of models such as the VF 3, VF 5, and VF 6.

More about VinFast Auto

VinFast Auto Ltd. operates in the automotive industry, specializing in the production and distribution of electric vehicles. The company is based in Hai Phong City, Vietnam, and focuses on maintaining a strong market presence in the domestic Vietnamese market.
